title: Festival prestige
description: Lead with atmosphere, authorship, and the film's most controlled dramatic images.
promisedExperience: a formally assured and emotionally serious film

title: Audience hook
description: State the central situation quickly and build toward the most accessible emotional turn.
promisedExperience: a clear, involving story with immediate stakes

title: Genre promise
description: Organize recognizable genre beats into a precise promise of tone, stakes, and payoff.
promisedExperience: a confident delivery of the film's genre pleasures

title: Mystery box
description: Withhold causal links and arrange provocative fragments around a central unanswered question.
promisedExperience: an intriguing puzzle that rewards attention

title: Character journey
description: Build the trailer around the protagonist's want, fracture, and emotional choice.
promisedExperience: an intimate transformation led by performance

title: Spectacle cut
description: Escalate scale, movement, locations, and visual peaks around a propulsive sound build.
promisedExperience: large-scale cinematic momentum and visual payoff

title: Critic pull-quote cut
description: Frame restrained footage with concise critical language and festival credentials.
promisedExperience: a recognized work of craft and cultural significance
